goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'postcode' and 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'expensive' price range and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should be 'in the same area as the attraction'.
Make sure you get 'hotel type'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'hotel' by '07:30'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get postcode and entrance fee
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the expensive price range and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the same area as the attraction
Make sure you get hotel type
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the hotel by 07:30
Make sure you get contact number and car type
